raw.message: Get an SSR Support Card ticket to celebrate Umamusume's win at TGA! Offer ends Jan 12!

hook.summary: A group of anime horse girls running towards the camera followed by a gameplay shot on a mobile device.
hook.visual_action: Anime horse girls running, transitioning to a hand holding a phone showing a character training.
hook.text_overlay: THE GAME AWARDS BEST MOBILE GAME

scene_flow: Intro showing a large cast of characters and a 'Best Mobile Game' award.
Gameplay demonstration of training a character on a mobile phone.
Transition to a racing scene showing the characters in action.
A concert performance scene highlighting the idol aspect of the game.
Final call to action with the game logo and download links.
on_screen_text: THE GAME AWARDS BEST MOBILE GAME
audience_proxy: Fans of anime and character collection games who enjoy simulation and idol-style performances.
